SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time = stringdate('1999-12-31 23:59'))));
SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time = stringdate('2000-01-01 00:00'))));
SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time = stringdate('2000-01-01 12:00'))));
SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time = stringdate('2000-01-01 23:59'))));
SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time = stringdate('2023-10-01 20:00'))));
SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time <= stringdate('2000-01-01 12:00'))));
SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time > stringdate('2000-01-01 12:00'))));
SELECT (datestring_GMT((SELECT event_time FROM Demo WHERE event_time BETWEEN stringdate('1999-12-31 23:00') AND stringdate('2000-01-01 01:00'))));
